nav.logout_error: Failed to logout. Please try again.

hero.subtitle_desc: . Born with Apple DNA. RAG infuses your agents with official documentation and video insights.

features.title: Powerful features for developers
features.subtitle: Built specifically for Apple developers, our platform provides the tools and features you need to find answers quickly and build better apps.
features.lightning_fast_desc: Get instant responses with our optimized search infrastructure.
features.always_secure_desc: MCP authentication ensures trusted access for your AI agents.
features.ai_search_desc: Advanced RAG hybrid technology understands context and provides accurate, relevant answers from Apple's documentation.
features.code_examples_desc: Get practical code examples in Swift, Objective-C, and SwiftUI alongside documentation references.
features.realtime_updates_desc: Our documentation index is continuously updated to reflect the latest Apple developer resources.

quickstart.title: Zero Token Setup, Instant Start
quickstart.subtitle: No sign-up, no token required. Just paste this config into your MCP client and start using it right away.

datasources.title: Multiple data sources, one search
datasources.subtitle: Empower your AI agents with comprehensive Apple developer knowledge - from official documentation to WWDC video transcripts - all accessible through our unified MCP interface.
datasources.docs_desc: All of Apple's official developer docs in one place, with smart AI search to help your AI agents find exactly what they need, fast.
datasources.fight_title: No shirt, no shoes, no weapons.
datasources.fight_desc: If someone yells "stop!", goes limp, or taps out, the fight is over.
datasources.videos_desc: Full transcripts from Apple Developer videos - WWDC talks, coding tutorials, and tech sessions, all easily searchable through our RAG system.

testimonials.title: Developers Are Loving This!
testimonials.subtitle: Discover why developers are making our Apple RAG MCP a core part of their stack.
testimonials.quote1: I went from zero iOS knowledge to shipping apps without writing a single line of code. This MCP is pure magic for non-developers like me!
testimonials.quote2: LLMs were decent, but never quite hit the mark for serious Apple development. This MCP changes everything - finally, AI that truly gets Apple's ecosystem.
testimonials.quote3: I've been looking for this kind of solution for a while and even evaluated building something similar internally. The execution here is solid and well-architected.
testimonials.quote4: Whoever designed these pricing tiers is brilliant. Perfect balance of accessibility and value - fits my workflow like a glove.
testimonials.quote5: Great to see quality commercial MCP products like this. It's good for the ecosystem and shows developers can actually make money doing this right.

pricing.title: Choose the right plan for you
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. All plans include access to our AI-powered MCP.
pricing.choose_cycle: Select the billing cycle that works best for you
pricing.login_required: Please sign in first to subscribe

pricing.conflict_onetime_active: You have an active one-time pass. You can subscribe after it expires.

plans.hobby_desc: Perfect for getting started and small projects.
plans.pro_desc: Best for professional developers and growing teams.
plans.enterprise_desc: Advanced features for large teams and organizations.

cta.subtitle: hits walls sometimes. We keep your AI agents flowing through Apple's complex ecosystem with instant, precise knowledge.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your MCP usage and manage your account
dashboard.skill_subtitle: Teach your AI agent to use Apple RAG MCP
dashboard.skill_desc: Copy skills/apple-dev-docs/ from our GitHub repo to your agent's skill location:
dashboard.xcode_desc: Bridges AI agents with complete Xcode operations. Enables autonomous building, testing, and deployment - everything Xcode can do, AI agents can now do.
dashboard.stats_freshness: Data automatically updated daily to ensure freshness!
dashboard.stats_heading: Our most comprehensive Apple knowledge base for AI agents

ips.title: Authorized IP Addresses
ips.subtitle: Configure IP addresses for automatic authentication with MCP without tokens
ips.current_ip_desc: When connecting from authorized IPs, you won't need to provide MCP tokens. You'll still get the same features and rate limits as your subscription plan.

ips.name_placeholder: Enter a name for this IP (e.g., Home Office, Mobile)

ips.how_1: Add up to 10 IP addresses (home, office, mobile hotspot, etc.)
ips.how_2: When using MCP from these IPs, authentication is automatic
ips.how_3: No need to configure or remember MCP tokens
ips.how_4: You still get the same features and rate limits as your subscription plan
ips.how_5: IP and token authentication work independently - you can use either method
